signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below 2.4% Forecast | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market expectations of 2.4% amid contained price pressures before Middle East energy volatility.[1]  
This aligns closely with Statistics Korea data showing 2.16% YoY (CPI at 118.8) and 0.34

signals.headline: Trump Announces Immediate US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz in Response to Iran's Closure | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Immediate US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz in Response to Iran's Closure | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump posted on **Truth Social** on April 12, 2026, accusing Iran of “world extortion” for closing the Strait of Hormuz and directing the **US Navy** to impose its own blockade “**effective immediately**,” including interdiction of vessels that paid tolls to Iran.[1]
matched_markets: Will Trump’s approval rating be between 39.0 and 39.4 on April 24, 2026?
